title: Minecraft Earth Cows
description: A resourcepack that adds all the variations of cow from Minecraft Earth to the base game.
body:
![All Cow Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d98bf0f04c3fac9bc30008a0d77b299515f30a79.png)

You know all those cool cow variations from Minecraft Earth, that aren't in the base game? Well this resourcepack fixes that. All cows featuring in MC Earth now has a place in your Minecraft world.

The sheep can all be found in their respective biome.

The biomes the cows can be found in are the following:

<details>
<summary>Default, Cream, Dairy and Albino Cows</summary>
These cows can be found in any biome without their own unique variant. The cows have the following rarity: Default 966 in 1699, Cream 366 in 1699, Dairy 366 in 1699 and Albino 1 in 1699. 

![Default](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f469f24a873167a8d961abb79855dfe5bc19e534.png)

![Cream](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6e4eb954507898db3cde079e26827708d2d6d99.png)

![Dairy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75795a4f65c7863a79afaeab2cccfa4636c812df.png)

![Albino](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eda9c3844a74c53bcfef2cd8c7fc7a4a0cc5387.png)

(If you're wondering why the numbers are so specific, it's because I've tried to mimic the IRL Albino rarity /10 (else it would be WAY to rare))


</details>

<details>
<summary>Woolly and Umbral Cows</summary>
These spawn in the following biomes: snowy_plains, snowy_taiga, ice_spikes, frozen_river, frozen_ocean, deep_frozen_ocean, snowy_beach, taiga, old_growth_pine_taiga and old_growth_spruce_taiga. In these biomes the Umbral cow has a 1 in 100 chance of spawning instead of the Woolly Cow.

![Woolly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6d3cdef1121b3a5e3cf1f1a427c6fdd00fd81b4.png)

![Umbral](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d341ce3e5630c7c4da1f1ad50ea32f01bdcc6bd.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Sunset and Pinto Cows</summary>
These spawn in the following biomes: badlands, eroded_badlands, wooded_badlands, desert, savanna, savanna_plateau and windswept_savanna.

![Sunset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a99c744859c1dd5f7bc2ca8ef76e47396c651132.png)

![Pinto](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8728f13a761de626cd864df53cff4105591624e.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Cookie and Ashen Cows</summary>
These spawn in the following biomes: snowy_slopes, grove, jagged_peaks and frozen_peaks.

![Cookie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f74c4ae533a1bf0e5153e53fcbc58ae7e553f919.png)

![Ashen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bccf33b5d29e43e54648a0272a75665bfbc0ba0e.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Moobloom and Moolip</summary>
These spawn in the following biomes: flower_forest, sunflower_plains and Meadow. The Moolip has a 1 in 5 chance of spawning instead of the Moobloom.

![Moobloom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c54a6852451a5c37264a82b8e4f226f8a191506e.png)

![Moolip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e77a79ae23c355ffd234c881d1a45a446c65b3ef.png)

</details>
